sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95956" key="splagxni/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπλαγχν-ίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπλάγχνον</foreign>, in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
